title: Emmanuel Katto Dubai : Hey everyone, I’m looking for suggestions on client portal software that would integrate smoothly with Monday.com. We need the portal to handle:
excerpt:
Hi Everyone I’m Emmanuel Katto from Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE) Client communication : Easy access to different company teams. 
Report viewing : Clients should be able to see their progress and performance reports. …

posts.author: emmanuelkatto24 (Emmanuel Katto)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone I’m Emmanuel Katto from Dubai, United Arab Emirates (UAE) Client communication : Easy access to different company teams.
Report viewing : Clients should be able to see their progress and performance reports.
Database access : Clients need access to relevant databases and documents.
Project requests : We want clients to submit new requests for projects directly through the portal.

Does anyone have any recommendations for third-party solutions that can integrate with Monday.com, or do you think building our own portal would be a better option? Would love to hear your thoughts or experiences!

Regards
Emmanuel Katto

posts.author: xatxat (Simon Kusterer @ Gorilla Apps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Emmanuel,

you might have already stumbled across it, we have an app in the marketplace called Client Portal Builder. This app lets you set up a Client Portal directly from monday.com and connect it with your own domain. Clients and accounts are managed in a monday board. You can also embed monday WorkForms, so you could for example create a “Project Request” WorkForm and embed that in the portal.

Let me know if you have any questions

– Simon (from Gorilla Apps)
